title: Garlicky Jasmine Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and aromatic fried rice dish infused with the essence of jasmine and the pungency of garlic.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the delicate herb (if using) and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the fried rice and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps.
Add the jasmine rice and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until the rice is well combined with the garlic and herb.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and garnish with chopped green onions (if using).
Note: You can customize this recipe by adding your favorite protein or vegetables to make it more substantial.
Additionally, you can adjust the amount of garlic to your taste, or omit it altogether if you're not a fan of garlic.
